name: Gather
description_short: Gather Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Kauai, Hawaii, offering competitive lending, deposit products, and financial planning services to strengthen island communities.
description_long:
Gather Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered, not-for-profit credit union serving the Kauai, Hawaii community. As a member-owned institution insured by the NCUA, Gather operates with a mission to strengthen the financial well-being of island communities through personalized service and competitive rates.

Gather offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (from 5.75% APR), personal loans (from 5.00% APR), home mortgages, HELOCs, energy-efficient loans, and student loans through a partnership with Ascent. Deposit products include checking accounts, savings accounts (Kasasa Cash offering up to 4.00% APY), retirement accounts, and share certificates. They also issue a Signature Visa with rewards (5% cash back on travel) and provide business checking and savings products for small business members.

Gather distinguishes itself through deep community integration on Kauai, featuring multiple branch locations with personalized service. Their digital offerings include online banking, mobile banking with credit score tracking, and mobile wallet functionality. They actively promote financial literacy through homebuyer education programs and host member engagement events like Youth Month Savings Challenges. The credit union demonstrates member-centric values through staff testimonials highlighting empathetic service during difficult life transitions.

As a credit union limited to serving Kauai residents or those with eligible employment, Gather's geographic and membership restrictions limit accessibility compared to national banks. Their product offerings are competitive but standard for credit unions of this size. The institution appears well-managed with stable operations, though specific information about account fees, membership requirements, or asset size is not disclosed on their public website.
services: Signature Visa credit card with rewards
Retirement accounts and financial advisory services
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.75% APR
High-yield savings account (Kasasa Cash) offering up to 4.00% APY
Visa rewards card with 5% cash back on travel purchases
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile app with built-in credit score tracking
Free homebuyer education program for first-time home buyers in Hawaii
Energy-efficient mortgage loans available for qualifying members
cons: Geographic limitation: primarily serves Kauai, Hawaii community only
Limited branch footprint compared to national banks or larger credit unions
No information disclosed about membership eligibility requirements or application process
Account fee structure not transparent on public website
Limited product disclosure compared to larger financial institutions
best_for: Kauai residents seeking personalized, community-focused banking with competitive rates
First-time homebuyers in Hawaii interested in mortgage financing and financial education
Small business owners needing tailored business checking and savings solutions
Consumers prioritizing digital banking access alongside local branch relationships
diagnosis: Gather FCU is ideal for Kauai residents and eligible members seeking relationship-based banking with competitive rates and strong digital capabilities. The primary limitation is geographic restriction to Hawaii, making this institution inaccessible to consumers outside the service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
